summary: The diff modifies OrderForm.tsx to show a new QRIS image, but uses the path '/assets/G191285866-0703A01-default.png' instead of the required '/assets/generated/qris.png'. The spec requires saving the image as 'frontend/public/assets/generated/qris.png' and referencing it accordingly. No evidence shows the image was saved at the correct path or that the src reference was updated to point to the correct location.

missing_requirements.requirement: Save the image as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/qris.png and update the src reference in OrderForm.tsx to point to this new file (/assets/generated/qris.png).
missing_requirements.reason: The file-diff summary explicitly states the QRIS image is referenced from '/assets/G191285866-0703A01-default.png' rather than the required '/assets/generated/qris.png'. No new file was added to 'frontend/public/assets/generated/qris.png' (ADDED FILES shows none). The acceptance criteria require the image to be served from frontend/public/assets/generated/qris.png.
